name: Johny Bonny
overview: Janardan Das, alias Johny, is a rookie policeman dreaming of making it big. He works officially as a security cover for an influential political leader. The story is about the policing system, the game of chess and the dream of a rookie officer and an adolescent boy, Bonny.

trailers.title: Johny Bonny | Official Trailer | Debasish | Ankit | Swastika | Abhijit Chowdhury | KLiKK
